title: Choose a welcoming community that offers services in French - Canada.ca
content:
## Choose a welcoming community that offers services in French
Canada is home to many vibrant Francophone communities outside Quebec. Among them, 24 communities have been selected and are actively committed to welcoming French-speaking and bilingual newcomers. They offer services to help you settle and achieve your new life goals.
Knowledge of English is important to successfully integrate and thrive in these communities. However, proficiency in French is a valuable asset that can open many doors in the Canadian job market. Take advantage of this benefit by settling in a welcoming community that offers promising opportunities and a unique quality of life.
Find a place to live that meets your needs today.

## Where do you want to settle?
Explore immigration programs to live, work, or study in Canada

### Podcast: Listen to learn about the Francophone communities Available to listen in French only
Podcast series: My new home
This podcast features the inspiring and relatable journeys of French-speaking immigrants who have chosen to live in Canada. Listen to their first experiences to learn how these individuals contribute to their new communities and what these communities bring them in return.
English transcriptions of the episodes are available.

### More resources for stakeholders and employers
- Lean more about the Welcoming Francophone Communities initiative
- How to hire French-speaking and bilingual workers

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
